title: Low CPU utilization in simple query
poc: create table sales_fact (key1 int, key2 char(1), date date, product int, color int, size char(5), style int, qty double precision, total double precision, total_ex double precision);
select product,sum(qty) from sales_fact group by productid;
key_bug_features: group by productid in sales_fact query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sales_fact (key1 int, key2 char(1), date date, product int, color int, size char(5), style int, qty double precision, total double precision, total_ex double precision);
INSERT INTO sales_fact (key1, key2, date, product, color, size, style, qty, total, total_ex) VALUES (1, 'A', '2023-01-01', 101, 1, 'M', 1, 10.0, 100.0, 110.0);
INSERT INTO sales_fact (key1, key2, date, product, color, size, style, qty, total, total_ex) VALUES (2, 'B', '2023-01-02', 102, 2, 'L', 2, 20.0, 200.0, 220.0);
SELECT product, SUM(qty) FROM sales_fact GROUP BY product;
SELECT product, SUM(qty) FROM sales_fact WHERE color IS NULL GROUP BY product;
